sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّمَازُجَ الِارْتِبَاطِيَّ بَيْنَ الْجَانِبِ السَّيْكُولُوجِيِّ وَالْبِنْيَةِ الْفِيزْيُولُوجِيَّةِ يُعَدُّ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي الطِّبِّ الشُّمُولِيِّ الْمُعَاصِرِ.
sentences.translation: Relacijsko prožimanje psihološkog aspekta i fiziološke strukture smatra se kamenom temeljcem suvremene holističke medicine.
sentences.translationEn: The relational interweaving between the psychological aspect and the physiological structure is considered the cornerstone of contemporary holistic medicine.

sentences.arabic: وَتُؤَدِّي ضُغُوطُ الْحَيَاةِ الْحَدِيثَةِ، بِإِيقَاعِهَا الْمُتَسَارِعِ، إِلَى تَفَتُّتِ هَذِهِ الْوَحْدَةِ الِانْسِجَامِيَّةِ، مِمَّا يُفْضِي إِلَى أَعْرَاضٍ سَيْكُوسُومَاتِيَّةٍ مُعَقَّدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pritisci modernog života, sa svojim ubrzanim ritmom, dovode do fragmentacije ovog harmoničnog jedinstva, što rezultira složenim psihosomatskim simptomima.
sentences.translationEn: The pressures of modern life, with its accelerated pace, lead to the fragmentation of this harmonious unity, resulting in complex psychosomatic symptoms.

sentences.arabic: فَالنَّفْسُ حِينَمَا تَرْزَحُ تَحْتَ وَطْأَةِ الِاضْطِرَابِ، تَنْعَكِسُ آلَامُهَا عَلَى الْجَسَدِ فِي صُورَةِ إِعْيَاءٍ مُزْمِنٍ أَوْ اخْتِلَالَاتٍ وَظِيفِيَّةٍ غَامِضَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kada se psiha povije pod teretom poremećaja, njena se bol odražava na tijelu u obliku hroničnog umora ili zagonetnih funkcionalnih poremećaja.
sentences.translationEn: When the psyche languishes under the weight of disturbance, its pain is reflected on the body in the form of chronic fatigue or mysterious functional imbalances.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، لَا يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يَقْتَصِرَ السَّعْيُ نَحْوَ الصِّحَّةِ عَلَى مُجَرَّدِ خُلُوِّ الْبَدَنِ مِنَ الْعِلَلِ، بَلْ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَشْمَلَ تَحْقِيقَ تَوَازُنٍ وُجُودِيٍّ عَمِيقٍ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga se težnja ka zdravlju ne bi trebala ograničiti samo na odsustvo bolesti u tijelu, već mora obuhvatiti postizanje duboke egzistencijalne ravnoteže.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, the pursuit of health should not be limited merely to the absence of bodily ailments, but must include the achievement of a deep existential equilibrium.

sentences.arabic: وَتُشَكِّلُ مُمَارَسَاتُ الْيَقَظَةِ الذِّهْنِيَّةِ وَالتَّأَمُّلِ حِصْنًا مَنِيعًا ضِدَّ التَّآكُلِ النَّفْسِيِّ الَّذِي يُسَبِّبُهُ التَّوَتُّرُ الْمُسْتَمِرُّ.
sentences.translation: Prakse svjesnosti i meditacije čine neprobojnu tvrđavu protiv psihičke erozije uzrokovane neprekidnim stresom.
sentences.translationEn: Mindfulness and meditation practices form a formidable fortress against the psychological erosion caused by continuous stress.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَجَاهُلَ هَمَسَاتِ الْعَقْلِ الْمُتْعَبِ لَيْسَ إِلَّا دَعْوَةً لِصَرَاخِ الْجَسَدِ فِي لَحْظَةِ انْهِيَارٍ حَتْمِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ignorisanje šapata umornog uma nije ništa drugo do poziv tijelu da vrisne u neizbježnom trenutku kolapsa.
sentences.translationEn: Ignoring the whispers of a weary mind is nothing but an invitation for the body to scream in an inevitable moment of collapse.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي النِّهَايَةِ، تَبْقَى الْحَيَوِيَّةُ الْحَقِيقِيَّةُ نَسِيجًا مُحْكَمًا يُغْزَلُ مِنْ خُيُوطِ الطُّمَأْنِينَةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ وَالْمَنَاعَةِ الْجَسَدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, istinska vitalnost ostaje čvrsto tkivo satkano od niti psihičkog spokoja i fizičkog imuniteta.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, true vitality remains a tight fabric woven from the threads of psychological tranquility and physical immunity.
